title: UltraHardcore
description: A mod that makes Minecraft ALOT harder without changing the core gameplay
body:
This Mod makes Minecraft ALOT harder. A short list of what this mod does:

- Add a permanent Hunger effect
- When you burn you don't stop burning without exthingushing yourself
- Natural Regeneration has been disabled
- The game is in Hard mode the entire time
- More coming soon...
